audio_description: A female voice, speaking neutrally and at a moderate pace, recounts receiving night vision goggles, with a clear and steady tone throughout the audio.
temporal_description: A woman with blonde hair, wearing a patterned top, is seated and rummaging through a bag, holding up a small black object. Another person is partially visible in the foreground, with only their shoulder and part of their head in frame. In a separate shot, a man and a woman are seated on a couch; the man wears a dark blue shirt with a horizontal stripe and beige pants, while the woman wears a white blouse and blue pleated pants. Behind them, a person stands with their hands on the back of the couch. The room has a wooden dresser with a television on top, and various decorative items are visible in the background. The woman on the couch gestures with her hands while looking toward the person standing behind them.
